zh.lifeSummary: 當Sven Håkonsson於大約0970年出生時，他的父親Haakon Sigurdsson34歲，母親Tora Skagesdottir27歲。他和Holmfrid Eriksdotter至少有2個女兒。他去世於1016年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sven Håkonsson于大约0970年出生时，他的父亲Haakon Sigurdsson34岁，母亲Tora Skagesdottir27岁。他和Holmfrid Eriksdotter至少有2个女儿。他去世于1016年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Old Norse byname Sveinn ‘boy, lad’. It is now also used occasionally in England, perhaps with reference to the England (football team) coach, Sven Göran Eriksson ( b. 1948 ), and in the United States.

variants.name: Svend
meanings: from the Old Norse byname Sveinn ‘boy, lad’. It is now also used occasionally in England, perhaps with reference to the England (football team) coach, Sven Göran Eriksson ( b. 1948 ), and in the United States.

variants.name: Svein
meanings: from the Old Norse byname Sveinn ‘boy, lad’. It is now also used occasionally in England, perhaps with reference to the England (football team) coach, Sven Göran Eriksson ( b. 1948 ), and in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Sven Håkonsson was born about 0970, his father, Haakon Sigurdsson, was 34 and his mother, Tora Skagesdottir, was 27. He had at least 2 daughters with Holmfrid Eriksdotter. He died in 1016, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sven Håkonsson est né environ 0970, son père, Haakon Sigurdsson, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Tora Skagesdottir, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Holmfrid Eriksdotter. Il est décédé en 1016, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sven Håkonsson um 0970 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Haakon Sigurdsson 34 und seine Mutter Tora Skagesdottir 27. Er hatte mit Holmfrid Eriksdotter mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1016 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sven Håkonsson è nato il circa 0970, il suo padre, Haakon Sigurdsson, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Tora Skagesdottir, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Holmfrid Eriksdotter. Morì nel 1016, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sven Håkonssonが約0970年に生まれた時，父Haakon Sigurdssonは34歳，母Tora Skagesdottirは27歳であった。彼はHolmfrid Eriksdotterとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1016年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sven Håkonsson(이)가 대략 0970년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Haakon Sigurdsson(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Tora Skagesdottir(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Holmfrid Eriksdotter(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1016년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sven Håkonsson nasceu aproximadamente 0970, seu pai, Haakon Sigurdsson, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Tora Skagesdottir, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Holmfrid Eriksdotter. Ele faleceu em 1016, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sven Håkonsson родился около 0970 г., его отцу по имени Haakon Sigurdsson было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Tora Skagesdottir, 27. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Holmfrid Eriksdotter. Он умер в 1016 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sven Håkonsson nació aproximadamente 0970, su papá, Haakon Sigurdsson, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Tora Skagesdottir, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Holmfrid Eriksdotter. Murió en 1016, a la edad de 47 años.
